homepage.title: Flowdrill - Friction Drilling
homepage.description: Friction Drilling is a cost-effective, proven, and reliable alternative to traditional fastening methods such as blind rivets, weld nuts, and press nuts. Friction drilling locally displaces material to increase material thickness and create a secure class 8 connection. Read more here!

Efficient, reliable
and lightweight
threaded connections
Friction drilling is changing the world to achieve stronger, cheaper, and quicker fastening connections.
More than 5000 customers across the world currently use our friction drilling technology, and this number is growing fast. Flowdrill offers an easy way to create a strong connection in almost any metal material. This process requires no additional components, no pre-machining operations, and no rework.
Our friction drilling tool locally displaces material to create increased material thickness. After tapping this results in a strong fastening connection.
Friction drilling is a valuable tool across various industries. For instance, car manufacturers rely on Flowdrill to reduce vehicle weight and increase strength. Furniture designers use friction drilling for an aesthetically pleasing finish. General fabricators appreciate the reduced production set-up times. Furthermore, the HVAC sector also benefits greatly from the chipless process.
Our friction drills are easy to set up and highly versatile. You can use them on manual equipment, custom-built automated systems, pillar drills, CNC machining centers, and even robots.
Why Flowdrill?
Process improvement
Reduced rework
Set up time Reduced
Cost saving per hole
A Flowdrill friction drill locally creates three times the material thickness which can subsequently be tapped or use a thread forming screw. Friction drilling allows customers to eliminate the use of standard fasteners such as rivet nuts and weld nuts.
Automotive
Delivering the Flowdrill connections that will accelerate the race to lighter and stronger parts.
Automotive
Office Furniture
Supporting design solutions that are functional and easy on the eye.

Fabrication
Overcoming fastening challenges to provide quicker cycle times,
less reworks and improved product appearance.
Fabrication
Flowdrill Range of tooling
Flowdrill offers a range of tooling designed to meet the specific demands of the desired connection. Our “Flowdrill standard” creates a collar around the hole, made from the base material. This collar adds extra strength and often serves as a sealing.  In addition to our collared version, we provide the “Flowdrill Flat” this friction drill removes the collar by cutting the material away, leaving a flush surface finish. Changing the way the world achieves stronger and quicker fastening connections.
Flowdrill is a tungsten carbide friction drill that provides a cost effective and reliable connection alternative to traditional fastening methods such as rivet, insert and weld nuts.
